а°«аұҲа°°аұҚ а°•а°ҝа°•аұҚа°Ҷа°«аұҚ | а°ӘаұӮа°°аұҚа°Өа°ҝ а°Ҝа°ҫа°Ёа°ҝа°®аұҮа°·а°ЁаұҚ | а°«аұҚа°°аұҖ а°«аұҲа°°аұҚ

вҡҪрҹҸҶ а°Ёа°ҝа°°аұҖа°•аұҚа°·а°Ј а°®аұҒа°—а°ҝа°ёа°ҝа°Ӯа°Ұа°ҝ. а°•а°ҝа°•аұҚа°Ҷа°«аұҚ а°Үа°ӘаұҚа°ӘаұҒа°ЎаұҮ а°®аұҠа°Ұа°Іа°өаұҒа°ӨаұҒа°Ӯа°Ұа°ҝ. рҹҸҶвҡҪ
а°ӘаұҚа°°аұҮа°•аұҚа°·а°•аұҒа°І а°•аұҮа°•а°ІаұҒ, а°¬аұӮа°ҹаұҚа°І а°ІаұҮа°ёаұҒа°ІаұҒ а°¬а°ҝа°—аұҒа°ёаұҒа°•аұҒа°ЁаұҚа°Ёа°ҫа°Ҝа°ҝ, а°•аұҖа°°аұҚа°Өа°ҝ а°•аұӢа°ёа°Ӯ а°Әа°°аұҒа°—аұҒ а°Үа°ӘаұҚа°ӘаұҒа°ЎаұҒ а°®аұҠа°Ұа°Іа°өаұҒа°ӨаұҒа°Ӯа°Ұа°ҝ. рҹҸҶ

а°«аұҲа°°аұҚ а°•а°ҝа°•аұҚа°Ҷа°«аұҚ а°ёаұҖа°ңа°ЁаұҚ а°өа°ҡаұҚа°ҡаұҮа°ёа°ҝа°Ӯа°Ұа°ҝ. а°ҡа°°а°ҝа°ӨаұҚа°° а°ёаұға°·аұҚа°ҹа°ҝа°Ӯа°ҡа°Ўа°ҫа°Ёа°ҝа°•а°ҝ а°®аұҖа°°аұҒ а°ёа°ҝа°ҰаұҚа°§а°Ӯа°—а°ҫ а°үа°ЁаұҚа°Ёа°ҫа°°а°ҫ? рҹ”ҘрҹҸҶ

Day 2 of the Survival Stage turns up the heat as the race for the Top 8 intensifies!

32 teams, divided into 4 groups, step in with one goal: secure a spot in the Semi Finals.

With all groups (A, B, C & D) in action today, the battleground will be packed with chaos, high-risk plays, and relentless fights. Only the Top 8 teams will advance to the Semi Finals, while the remaining 24 face elimination.

bn.title: аҰҶаҰ®аҰҝ аҰ•аҰҝаҰ• аҰҶ аҰІаҰҫаҰ•аҰҝ аҰ¬а§ҚаҰІаҰ•-аҰҸ аҰ…а§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰЎаҰ®аҰҝаҰЁ аҰ¬аҰҫаҰ°аҰ¬а§ҮаҰІ аҰӘа§Үа§ҹа§Ү аҰ—а§ҮаҰӣаҰҝ рҹҳұ
bn.description:
аҰҶаҰ®аҰҫаҰ° аҰЎаҰҝаҰёаҰ•аҰ°а§ҚаҰЎ аҰёаҰҫаҰ°а§ҚаҰӯаҰҫаҰ°а§Ү аҰҜа§ӢаҰ— аҰҰаҰҝаҰЁ: https://discord.gg/ayushmore

аҰҶаҰӘаҰЁаҰҫаҰ° аҰ®а§ӢаҰ°аҰ—а§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰӮаҰ•а§Ү аҰёаҰ®аҰ°а§ҚаҰҘаҰЁ аҰ•аҰ°а§ҒаҰЁ рҹ’ҷвқӨпёҸ: 
https://www.roblox.com/game-pass/251222055/Support-Your-MoreGang

аҰҶаҰ®аҰҝ аҰ…аҰ¬аҰ¶а§ҮаҰ·а§Ү 'аҰ•аҰҝаҰ• аҰҶ аҰІаҰҫаҰ•аҰҝ аҰ¬а§ҚаҰІаҰ•'-аҰҸ аҰ…а§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰЎаҰ®аҰҝаҰЁ аҰЎаҰҫаҰ®а§ҚаҰ¬а§ҮаҰІ аҰӘа§ҮаҰҜаҰја§ҮаҰӣаҰҝ рҹҳұ
аҰҹа§ҮаҰ•аҰЁа§Ӣ аҰ—а§ҮаҰ®аҰҫаҰ°аҰң аҰ®аҰҫаҰҮаҰЁаҰ•а§ҚаҰ°аҰҫаҰ«аҰҹ аҰ®аҰҫаҰҮаҰЁаҰ•а§ҚаҰ°аҰҫаҰ«аҰҹ аҰ®аҰҫаҰҮаҰЁаҰ•а§ҚаҰ°аҰҫаҰ«аҰҹ аҰёа§ҚаҰҹа§ӢаҰ°аҰҝ аҰӯаҰҝаҰЎаҰҝаҰ“ аҰ—а§ҮаҰ® аҰ№аҰҫаҰүаҰё аҰҡа§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰІа§ҮаҰһа§ҚаҰң аҰӘа§ҚаҰ°а§ӢаҰ¬аҰҜаҰја§ҮаҰң а§Ҝа§« аҰ—а§ҮаҰ®аҰҫаҰ°аҰ«а§ҚаҰІаҰҝаҰҹ аҰ…аҰӮаҰ¶а§Ғ аҰ¬аҰҝаҰ¶аҰӨ аҰҮаҰҜаҰја§ҮаҰё аҰёа§ҚаҰ®аҰҫаҰ°а§ҚаҰҹаҰҝ аҰӘаҰҫаҰҮ 

аҰ°а§ӢаҰ¬а§ҚаҰІаҰ•а§ҚаҰё аҰ—а§ҮаҰ® аҰӯаҰҝаҰЎаҰҝаҰ“ аҰҶаҰҜаҰја§ҒаҰ¶ аҰ®а§ӢаҰ° аҰ°а§ӢаҰ¬а§ҚаҰІаҰ•а§ҚаҰё
аҰҹа§ҮаҰ•аҰЁа§Ӣ аҰ—а§ҮаҰ®аҰҫаҰ°аҰң аҰӘа§ҚаҰ°а§ӢаҰ¬аҰҜаҰја§ҮаҰң а§Ҝа§« 

рҹ”І аҰҶаҰ®аҰҫаҰ° аҰ°а§ӢаҰ¬а§ҚаҰІаҰ•а§ҚаҰё аҰӘа§ҚаҰ°а§ӢаҰ«аҰҫаҰҮаҰІ: https://www.roblox.com/users/4342044275/profile 
____________________________

bn.title: аҰҶаҰ®аҰҝ аҰҶаҰ®аҰҫаҰ° аҰ°а§ҮаҰёаҰҝаҰӮ аҰёаҰҝаҰ®а§ҮаҰ° аҰңаҰЁа§ҚаҰҜ аҰҸаҰ•аҰҹаҰҝ аҰ•аҰҫаҰёа§ҚаҰҹаҰ® аҰӘаҰҝаҰёаҰҝ аҰ•аҰҝаҰЁа§ҮаҰӣаҰҝ рҹҳұ
bn.description:
#аҰ—а§ҮаҰ®аҰҫаҰ°аҰ«а§ҚаҰІаҰҝаҰҹ #аҰ…аҰӮаҰ¶а§ҒаҰ¬аҰҝаҰ·а§ҚаҰҹ #аҰ®аҰҫаҰҮаҰЁаҰ•а§ҚаҰ°аҰҫаҰ«аҰҹ

аҰҶаҰӘаҰЁаҰҫаҰ° аҰӘаҰҝаҰёаҰҝ аҰӨа§ҲаҰ°аҰҝ аҰ¬аҰҫ аҰҶаҰӘаҰ—а§ҚаҰ°а§ҮаҰЎ аҰ•аҰ°аҰӨа§Ү аҰҡаҰҫаҰҮаҰӣа§ҮаҰЁ?

аҰҶаҰёаҰІ аҰҜаҰЁа§ҚаҰӨа§ҚаҰ°аҰҫаҰӮаҰ¶, аҰ¬аҰҝаҰ¶а§ҮаҰ·аҰңа§ҚаҰһа§ҮаҰ° аҰӘаҰ°аҰҫаҰ®аҰ°а§ҚаҰ¶, аҰ•аҰҫаҰёа§ҚаҰҹаҰ® аҰӘаҰҝаҰёаҰҝ аҰ¬аҰҝаҰІа§ҚаҰЎ, аҰӘа§ҮаҰ°аҰҝаҰ«а§ҮаҰ°аҰҫаҰІ аҰҸаҰ¬аҰӮ аҰҶаҰӘаҰЁаҰҫаҰ° аҰёа§ҮаҰҹаҰҶаҰӘаҰ•а§Ү аҰҶаҰ°аҰ“ аҰүаҰЁа§ҚаҰЁаҰӨ аҰ•аҰ°аҰӨа§Ү аҰӘа§ҚаҰ°аҰҜаҰја§ӢаҰңаҰЁа§ҖаҰҜаҰј аҰёаҰ¬аҰ•аҰҝаҰӣа§Ғ аҰӘаҰҫаҰЁаҘӨ вҡЎрҹ’»

рҹ–ҘпёҸ **аҰ•аҰҫаҰёа§ҚаҰҹаҰ® аҰӘаҰҝаҰёаҰҝ аҰ¬аҰҝаҰІа§ҚаҰЎа§ҮаҰ° аҰңаҰЁа§ҚаҰҜ аҰ…аҰЁа§ҒаҰёаҰЁа§ҚаҰ§аҰҫаҰЁ:**

рҹ“һ **8976990523**

рҹ”§ **аҰӘаҰҝаҰёаҰҝ аҰӘаҰҫаҰ°а§ҚаҰҹаҰё аҰ“ аҰ•аҰ®а§ҚаҰӘа§ӢаҰЁа§ҮаҰЁа§ҚаҰҹаҰё:**

рҹ“һ **9321727055**

рҹҢҗ **аҰҸаҰ–аҰЁаҰҮ аҰ•аҰҝаҰЁа§ҒаҰЁ:** [EliteHubs](https://elitehubs.com)

snippet.title: Aaj Se Teri - Lyrical | Padman | Akshay Kumar & Radhika Apte | Arijit Singh | Amit Trivedi
snippet.description:
Singer - Arijit Singh
Music - Amit Trivedi
Lyricist - Kausar Munir

Crew Names:-
Produced & Arranged by - Amit Trivedi
Recording Engineers A T Studios  Mumbai  - Abhishek Sortey & Urmila Sutar 
Assisted by  Firoz Shaikh
Mixed by - Shadab Rayeen,  A T Studios & New Edge - Mumbai Assisted by : Abhishek Sortey & Dhananjay Khapekar
Mastered by - Donal Whelan, Masteringworld - U.K.
Executive Producer A T Studios - Krutee Trivedi
Head Of Production A T Studios - Aashish Narula

Musician Names:-
Programmed by Amit Trivedi, Gourab Dutta & Raja Rasaily
Dholak & Percussions - Sanket Naik  
Mandolin, Saz & Bouzouki - Tapas Roy  
Shehnai - Omkar Dhumal

Cast - Akshay Kumar, Radhika Apte & Sonam Kapoor
Production House - Hope Production Pvt Ltd
Producer - Twinkle Khanna, SPE Films India, KriArj Entertainment, Cape Of Good Films & Hope Productions
Director - R Balki

Lyrics:
Mukhda -
Aaj Se Teri Saari Galiyaan Meri Ho Gayi, 
Aaj Se Mera Ghar Tera Ho GayaвҖҰ

Aaj Se Teri Saari Galiyaan Meri Ho Gayi, 
Aaj Se Mera Ghar Tera Ho GayaвҖҰ
Aaj Se Meri Saari Khushiyaan Teri Ho Gayi,
Aaj Se Tera Gum Mera Ho Gaya. 

Ho Tere Kandhe Ka Jo Til Hai, 
Ho Tera Seene Mein Jo Dil Hai, 
Ho Teri Bijli Ka Jo Bill Hai-
Aaj Se Mera Ho GayaвҖҰ

Ho Mere Khwabon Ka Ambar,
Ho Meri Khushiyon Ka Samandar,
Ho Mere Pin Code Ka Number-
Aaj Se Tera Ho Gaya. 

Antara 1- 
Tere Maathe AaaaaвҖҰ.Tere Maathe Ke Kumkum Ko
Main Tilak Lagaa Ke Ghoomoonga, 
Teri Baali Ki Chhunchhun Ko
Main Dil Se Lagaa Ke JhoomoongaвҖҰ

Meri Chhoti Si Bhoolon, 
Ko Tu Nadiya Mein Baha Dena.
Tere Jude Ke Phoolon Ko, 
Main Apne Shirt Mein Pehnoonga.

Bas Mere Liye Tu Maalpue Kabhi Kabhi Bana DenaвҖҰ

Aaj Se Meri Saari Ratiyaan Teri Ho Gayi, 
Aaj Se Tera Din Mera Ho Gaya. 

Ho Tere Kandhe Ka Jo Til Hai, 
Ho Tera Seene Mein Jo Dil Hai,

Letra/Lyrics for "Dominic Fike - Babydoll"

[Chorus]
And I can't move on, babydoll
Waitin' on calls, flippin' through stations
I'm outclassed and it's outrageous (Ooh)
And I'll take it all, babydoll
Whatever's been weighin' you down (Eeh)

[Verse]
Find me on Miami concrete
Lookin' for somebody different 'cause my daddy was a pimp (Ooh, ooh, ooh)
My mama had her issues but I miss her anyway
Oh, babydoll (Ooh, ooh-ooh)
Please don't call me for the wrong reasons
We both know exactly what I'm thinkin'
Weeks pass and I never grow tired
'Cause I never said never and I barely ever lie
I'm on the road to an original place in outer space
I didn't make it up, but you can't find it on a phone or a globe
And I can take you with me if you really wanna go
Oh, babydoll, I can't move on

[Chorus]
And I can't move on, babydoll
Waitin' on calls, flippin' through stations
I'm outclassed and it's outrageous (Ooh)
And I'll take it all, babydoll
Whatever's been weighin' you down

snippet.title: Power Star Pawan Singh: Devra Nihare (Song) | Neelam Giri | Superhit Bhojpuri Song 2026
snippet.description:
аӨӨаҘҲаӨҜаӨҫаӨ° аӨ№аҘӢ аӨңаӨҫаӨҲаӨӮ аӨҰаӨҝаӨІ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ§аӨЎаӨјаӨ•аӨЁ аӨ¬аӨўаӨјаӨҫаӨөаҘҮ аӨөаӨҫаӨІаӨҫ аӨёаҘҒаӨӘаӨ°аӨ№аӨҝаӨҹ аӨ§аӨ®аӨҫаӨ•аӨҫ аӨ–аӨҫаӨӨаӨҝаӨ°!
Power Star Pawan Singh аӨ•аҘҮ аӨҰаӨ®аӨҰаӨҫаӨ° аӨҶаӨөаӨҫаӨң аӨ…аӨүаӨ° Neelam Giri аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ•аӨҫаӨӨаӨҝаӨІ аӨ…аӨҰаӨҫаӨҜаӨ—аҘҖ аӨёаҘҮ аӨёаӨңаӨІ вҖңDevra NihareвҖқ аӨ…аӨ¬ аӨ°аӨүаӨҶ аӨёаӨ¬аӨ•аҘҮ аӨҰаӨҝаӨІ аӨӘаӨ° аӨ°аӨҫаӨң аӨ•аӨ°аҘҮ аӨҶ аӨ—аӨҮаӨІ аӨ¬аӨҫаҘӨ 
рҹ’ҘвқӨпёҸ аӨ«аҘҒаӨІ аӨ°аҘӢаӨ®аӨҫаӨӮаӨё, аӨ¶аӨҫаӨЁаӨҰаӨҫаӨ° аӨ®аҘҚаӨҜаҘӮаӨңаӨҝаӨ• аӨ”аӨ° аӨңаӨ¬аӨ°аӨҰаӨёаҘҚаӨӨ аӨҸаӨӮаӨҹаӨ°аӨҹаҘҮаӨЁаӨ®аҘҮаӨӮаӨҹ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ®аӨңаӨҫ аӨІаҘҖаӨӮ аӨҸаӨ•аҘҮ аӨёаӨҫаӨҘ вқӨпёҸрҹҡҖ

#powerstarpawansingh #Devranihare #newbhojpurisong

snippet.title: Lord Huron - The Night We Met ft. Phoebe Bridgers (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
lord huron - the night we met ft. phoebe bridgers

thank you for spending a moment here with us. 
we hope the music brought you a little comfort.

feel free to subscribe if you felt the warmth of the music рҹҢҹ

В· follow Lord Huron:
spotify: https://open.spotify.com/artist/6ltzsmQQbmdoHHbLZ4ZN25?si=ceG_XiZFTRi5QMzogtqv2w
apple music: https://music.apple.com/us/artist/lord-huron/393068687

В· follow Phoebe Bridgers:
spotify: https://open.spotify.com/artist/1r1uxoy19fzMxunt3ONAkG?si=8VS8pdscTLiRO0mY7TyjKQ
apple music: https://music.apple.com/us/artist/phoebe-bridgers/697833299

lyrics:
[intro]
(ooh, ooh, ooh)
(ooh, ooh, ooh)
(ooh, ooh, ooh)
(ooh, ooh, ooh)

[verse 1: ben schneider, ben schneider & phoebe bridgers]
i am not the only traveler
who has not repaid his debt
i've been searching for a trail to follow again
take me back to the night we met
and then i can tell myself
what the hell i'm supposed to do
and then i can tell myself
not to ride along with you

[chorus: ben schneider & phoebe bridgers, ben schneider]
i had all and then most of you
some and now none of you
take me back to the night we met
i don't know what i'm supposed to do
haunted by the ghost of you
oh, take me back to the night we met

[verse 2: phoebe bridgers]
when the night was full of terrors
and your eyes were filled with tears
when you had not touched me yet
oh, take me back to the night we met

[chorus: ben schneider & phoebe bridgers, phoebe bridgers]
i had all and then most of you
some and now none of you
take me back to the night we met
i don't know what i'm supposed to do
haunted by the ghost of you
take me back to the night we met

#lordhuron #thenightwemet #phoebebridgers

snippet.title: Unstable SMP: Civil War FINALE
snippet.description:
After I Became King of the Unstable SMP, the world split into two different sides: the new players, and the old ones. After the old players took control of Highwater city, they began invading different cities across my kingdom... this time with a different strategy. This is Unstable SMP: Civil War FINALE. 

Unstable SMP:
вһң вҖӘ  вҖӘ  вҖӘвҖӘ @FlameFragsMC 
вһң      @wemmbumc 
вһң     вҖӘвҖӘ @Spokeishere 
вһң      @ParrotX2 

Like ParrotX2 and his Unstable SMP series, where he is escaping Paragon / Proton: Minecraft's Most Secure Prison, or got hunted by a Minecraft Player who doesn't exist. This is a new and original Minecraft idea like HermitCraft or Lifesteal with Wemmbu, FlameFrags, or Spoke. Survival is harder than Hardcore Minecraft because PVP is on.
